text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Japan Cup is here. Before heading to the
waiting area, Admire Vega declares her upcoming
victory to her rivals.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Naturally, her rivals are not to be outdone
without a fight. Each of them heads to the
showdown on the track, bearing their own
motives.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And Narita Top Road sits in the stands to watch
them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If Admire Vega defeats the all-star competition
gathered here from around the globe, she'll
become a first-magnitude star... Let the race
begin!
